zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne是Thomas de Arden和Lucia的兒子，於1240年出生在英國奧可福爾。他和Nicola Bardolf至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1331年在英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦本哈姆享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne是Thomas de Arden和Lucia的儿子，于1240年出生在英国奧可福爾。他和Nicola Bardolf至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1331年在英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦本哈姆享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Patrice, Jacques.
French and Walloon: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from the Ardennes, a forested plateau in northeastern France, Belgium (Wallonia), and Luxembourg.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from a place called Ardenne, for example in Charente-Maritime and Haute-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne was born in 1240, in Oxfordshire, England as the son of Thomas de Arden and Lucia. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Nicola Bardolf. He died about 1331, in Wappenham, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne est né en 1240, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, fils de Thomas de Arden et Lucia. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Nicola Bardolf. Il est décédé environ 1331, à Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne wurde 1240 in Oxfordshire, England, als Sohn von Thomas de Arden und Lucia geboren. Er hatte mit Nicola Bardolf mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1331 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Wappenham, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne è nato il nel 1240 nel Oxfordshire, England come figlio di Thomas de Arden e Lucia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Nicola Bardolf. Morì circa 1331, nel Wappenham, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderneは1240年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでThomas de ArdenとLuciaの息子として生まれた。彼はNicola Bardolfとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1331年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワップエンハムで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne(은)는 1240년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Thomas de Arden(와)과 Lucia의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Nicola Bardolf(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1331년 영국 노르섬프토실르 왑펜함에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne nasceu em 1240, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra filho de Thomas de Arden e Lucia. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Nicola Bardolf. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1331, em Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne родился в 1240 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Thomas de Arden и Lucia. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Nicola Bardolf. Он умер около 1331 г. в местности ваппенам, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d'Arderne nació en 1240, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas de Arden y Lucia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Nicola Bardolf. Murió aproximadamente 1331, en Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 92 años.
